series_metadata.series_description: All documents which are included in the corporate officers'' assessment files are duplicated and retain. These documents are 1) requests from the Attorney General''s office for reassessment, (2) request form Legal and 3) Vendor''s license application, IOC''s from districts that provide names, addresses or signatures to support the reassessment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until reassessment is paid. Then transfer to agency records center for 4 years then destroyed by shredding. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until reassessment is paid. Then transfer to agency records center for 4 years then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
